app.title: PixelSafe
app.tagline: Your images never leave your browser

dropzone.title: Drop your images here
dropzone.subtitle: or click to select files
dropzone.formats: Supports JPEG, PNG, WebP, GIF (static), HEIC

settings.title: Optimization Settings
settings.transparencyWarning: JPEG does not support transparency — transparent areas will become white

errors.animated_gif_not_supported: Animated GIFs are not supported to preserve animation
errors.heicNotSupported: Your browser does not support HEIC — try Safari or convert to JPEG

privacy.description: All processing happens in your browser. Your images are never uploaded to any server.

confirm.clearMessage: All images and results will be removed. This cannot be undone.
